title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kolte-Patil Developers is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!
